cases.prompt: Map the architecture of this repo and explain the main boundaries and responsibilities.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a structured code map of the repository.

cases.prompt: Create the set of docs that describe the codebase concerns and conventions.
cases.expected_behavior: Generates an overview of codebase structure and design themes.

cases.prompt: Find the function that formats dates.
cases.expected_behavior: This is a targeted search request, not a full codemap.

cases.prompt: I need a quick map of the repo before making changes in three different areas.
cases.expected_behavior: Builds an architecture-level orientation map across areas of the codebase.
